name: Bran Muffins-in-Waiting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the warm water with 1 cup of wheat/oat bran cereal.
2. Sift together the flour and baking soda.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter until creamy. Add sugar 1/2 cup at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Blend in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Scrape sides of the bowl often.
5. Stir in the flour mixture 1/2 cup at a time, alternating with the butter/sour milk added 1/2 cup at a time as well.
6. Stir in the soaked bran and the remaining bran cereal.
7. Cover and store in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours before baking.
8. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
9. Gently stir the batter. Fill each muffin cup with about 1/4 cup of batter.
10. Bake for about 20 minutes, or until nicely browned. Remove from the pan and serve hot with butter.
11. Makes 6 cups of batter or about 24 2 1/2-inch muffins.
